frozen_family.name: late_repair90_fill_to_balance_after_90
frozen_until: same-window source fields are available through an allowed local adapter
a local verifier returns KEEP on no-order parity evidence
the main thread explicitly approves any future shadow run
do_not_repeat: any fill-to-balance90 canary or promotion action from local historical evidence alone

missing_source_fields: exact live source_sequence_id ordering across book and trade events
pending-order queue, touch, and fill timing
true shared-ingress book/trade interleaving for the 2026-05-20 diagnostic shadow window
per-candidate source links from seed decisions to residual lots and pair actions

status_contract.local_historical_candidate_pipeline_posi: research-only evidence; not deployable and not promotion/canary evidence
status_contract.live_no_order_shadow_failure: promotion candidate discarded because normalized residual/tail budget and conservative risk-adjusted proxy failed
status_contract.top_level_interpretation: UNKNOWN for the underlying fill-to-balance idea due source/window field gap, DISCARD for exact shadow promotion candidates

next_local_verifier.name: same_window_source_field_readiness_verifier
allowed_inputs: candidate_base or candidate_registry schema under POLY_BT_ROOT
pulled no-order summary, aggregate, audit, and acceptance JSON
output_required: field availability matrix for no-order parity
adapter/spec proposal if fields are sufficient
exact missing fields if not sufficient
next_local_verifier.keep_criteria: Produces a default-off source-field adapter/spec that can support a local no-order parity verifier without prohibited data sources.
next_local_verifier.unknown_criteria: Allowed local fields are insufficient and the verifier names the exact same-window source fields required.
next_local_verifier.discard_criteria: Allowed local data cannot support a useful verifier and no safe default-off instrumentation path exists.
next_local_verifier.blocked_criteria: Required local schema or pulled JSON artifacts are missing or corrupt.
